name: Kaevo
description: Connects Jellyfin to Kaevo Cloud through an outbound-only, least-privilege connector with local playback processing.
overview: Secure Kaevo Cloud access for Jellyfin

versions.changelog: Adds the plugin-only Kaevo Cloud connector, remote metadata and artwork, guarded Jellyfin writes, playback preparation, and an outbound secure playback relay.
Fixes Jellyfin 10.11 snapshot item querying and restores the Kaevo settings page with a configurable snapshot limit.
Fixes main snapshot compatibility with Jellyfin 10.11 while preserving bounded read-only metadata and image tags.
Initial Kaevo release with local read-only status, media counts, and bounded main snapshot endpoints.
